options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: death_link
options.description: When you die, everyone who enabled death link dies. Of course, the reverse is true too.

options.name: goal
options.description:
The goal for your game.
Throne Room: Get to the Throne Room and defeat Menace there.
Abyss: Open the path to the Mine of Judgment, then defeat Menace in the Abyss.

options.name: replace_menace_with_soma
options.description: Replaces Menace with Soma-Dracula

options.name: menace_condition
options.description:
This Condition is required to be met before you can fight Menace.
None: None
Throne Room: Defeat Aguni in the Throne Room (If Goal is set to throne room, this will be set to None.)
Garden: Avoid the bad ending in the Garden of Madness
Bosses: Defeat all available bosses

options.name: mine_condition
options.description:
This Condition is required to be met before you can enter the Mine of Judgment.
None: None
Throne Room: Defeat Aguni in the Throne Room (If Goal is set to throne room, the mine and the Abyss will be inaccessible.)
Garden: Avoid the bad ending in the Garden of Madness
Bosses: Defeat all available bosses

options.name: garden_condition
options.description:
This Condition is required to be met before Celia appears in the Garden of Madness.
None: None
Throne Room: Defeat Aguni in the Throne Room (This condition is considered unreachable if Goal is set to throne room)
Bosses: Defeat all available bosses

options.name: soul_randomizer
options.description:
Randomizes Enemy souls.
Disabled: Enemy souls are unchanged.
Shuffled: Enemy souls will be shuffled amongst each other. Souls that unlock things are unchanged.
Soulsanity: Enemy soul drops can be anything, even important items or non-souls. You can change the expected soul rarity with Soulsanity level.

options.name: soulsanity_level
options.description:
The maximum tier of soul rarity that have Locations on them.
Rare souls always expect you to have the Soul Eater Ring.

options.name: guaranteed_souls
options.description:
The specified Souls will be guaranteed to have at least one copy in the item pool. Unspecified souls can still be randomly selected from the soul pool.
You can also use Common, Uncommon, or Rare to add all souls of that rarity.

options.name: soul_drop_percentage
options.description: Percentage applied to an enemy's base chance of dropping their soul.

options.name: starting_weapon
options.description:
The weapon you start the game with.
Random Base: Start with a random base-level weapon
Random Any: Start with any random weapon
You can also choose to start with any specific weapon.

options.name: shop_randomizer
options.description: Randomizes Hammer's shop items.

options.name: gate_items
options.description:
Defines how the 4 metal switch gates act.
Normal: Normal behavior. Gates can only be opened by pressing the respective button.
Add Keys: The same as normal behavior, but also adds keys to the item pool that can open the gate from the other side.
Buttonsanity: Adds keys to each gate, and the corresponding button will grant a check.

options.name: disable_boss_seals
options.description: Removes the requirement to draw Magic Seals to defeat bosses.

options.name: early_seal_1
options.description: Places Magic Seal 1 early in your own game to prevent getting stuck early.

options.name: seal_shuffle
options.description:
Randomizes which seal is required for each boss/door.
Early Seal 1 will guarantee Flying Armor to always use Seal 1.

options.name: randomize_seal_patterns
options.description: Randomizes the drawn pattern for Magic Seals, as well as their rotation.

options.name: randomize_synthesis_souls
options.description: Randomizes which souls are required for Synthesis crafting.

options.name: shuffle_starting_warp_room
options.description: Randomizes which Warp Room is unlocked by default.

options.name: open_drawbridge
options.description: If enabled, the drawbridge in Lost Village will start open instead of closed.

options.name: randomize_red_soul_walls
options.description: Randomizes which souls are needed to break the red Soul Barriers.

options.name: shuffle_enemy_drops
options.description: Randomizes items dropped by enemies

options.name: experience_percentage
options.description: What percentage of EXP enemies give you. This is a percent of their original EXP amount.

options.name: hard_mode
options.description:
Puts the game in Hard Mode. Enemies are tougher, sometimes have additional properties, but drop rates are increased.
There are no checks exclusive to Hard Mode.

options.name: boss_shuffle
options.description: Randomizes boss fights.

options.name: remove_money_gates
options.description: Removes the gates that require you to own a specific amount of money.

options.name: reveal_map
options.description: Start with the entire map visible.

options.name: reveal_hidden_walls
options.description: Automatically destroys/reveals all breakable walls

options.name: fix_luck
options.description:
Fixes how the Luck stat is applied.
With the fix applied, each point of luck gives +0.1% to any drop.
Without the fix, each point of luck is +0.04% for souls, 0.25% for items.

options.name: boost_speed
options.description: Increases Soma's base walking speed by 33%

options.name: one_screen_mode
options.description: Allows the entire game to be played with only the bottom screen. Press Select to view the map.

options.name: no_mp_bat
options.description: Removes Bat Company's MP cost

options.name: passive_soul_eater_ring
options.description:
If enabled, you will gain the bonus from the Soul Eater Ring without needing to equip it
as long as you have at least one in your inventory.

options.name: area_music_randomizer
options.description: Randomizes area music.

options.name: boss_music_randomizer
options.description: Randomizes boss music.

options.name: local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be in their native world.

options.name: non_local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be outside their native world.

options.name: start_inventory
options.description: Start with the specified amount of these items. Example: "Bomb: 1"

options.name: start_hints
options.description: Start with these item's locations prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: start_location_hints
options.description: Start with these locations and their item prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: item_links
options.description: Share part of your item pool with other players.

options.name: plando_items
options.description: Generic items plando.

options.name: start_inventory_from_pool
options.description:
Start with the specified amount of these items and don't place them in the world. Example: "Bomb: 1"

The game decides what the replacement items will be.
